11. ~conductor(beethoven) [flattening 10]
16. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X1) | (~orchestra(X0) | ~leads(X1,X0))) [ennf transformation 7]
17. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X1) | ~orchestra(X0) | ~leads(X1,X0)) [flattening 16]
